title: The Great npm Heist That Wasn't
relevance_summary: Phishing attack via compromised npm package maintainer account leading to potential crypto-clipper deployment

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys or updates packages on npm with suspicious activity

monitoring_rules: Monitor for unusual package update patterns
Detect and block suspicious npm package deployments
summary: Attackers compromised a npm package maintainer's account to deploy a crypto-clipper, but due to lack of targeted victims, no funds were lost.
